title: Smoking Stuff - A Wizard's Hobby
description: Smoking Stuff's main focus is to provide an alternative to potions, the Magic Tubes.
body:
# Smoking Stuff - A Wizard's Hobby

![Main Mod Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63542919c236661163f58ce1e76e25370e1ab461.png)

        Main mod Textures


Smoking Stuff's main focus is to provide an alternative to potions, the Magic Tubes.  This Magic Tubes will act as a potion where the duration of the effect will depend on the amount of time you spend using them. This magic tubes let you manage the time you spend under a certain effect while also providing better results than an average potion.

## Main Content

**Magical Herb:**

The main resource in the mod, used to craft almost everything. You will be able to obtain its seeds via villagers, particularly Farmers. Every other type of villager will offer some emeralds for them, even Nitwits.

**Magic Tube:**

The main item in the mod, can give you potion effects when used.

**Golden Magic Tube:**

A variant of the Magic Tube, can be crafted with golden paper, which is also included in the mod. This variant will give you either a longer duration of the effect or a higher level effect than its normal version.

**Magic Pipe:**

A more elegant approach to this activity. The Magic Tube will let you create smoke circles wherever you go. The more you hold the bigger the radius.

**Magical Grinder:**

This will be the only way to obtain any Magic Tube. First, you will need to process some Magical Herb in a smoker in order to obtain the Dried Magical Herb, which you will use in the Magic Grinder to obtain Crushed Magical Herb, needed ingredient for Magic Tubes. Take into account that you will either need two Dried Magical Herbs or combine one of them in the Magical Grinder with any potion ingredient to obtain a special variant of the Crushed Magical Herb.

## Compatibility
The mod is currently compatible with the JEI, as well as Create when it comes to the crop collecting mechanic.

 

## Future Content
I will be adding more stuff in the future, so stay tunned!
